plugin.name: ThreeS_WorldEvent
plugin.author: Joakim
plugin.purpose: 3Scapes world-event window + alert for [WORLD EVENT NOTICE]
plugin.description:
Watches for [WORLD EVENT NOTICE] announcements and keeps them in a small window so you can see the current event at a glance, plus a list of recent ones. Also fires a coloured note and an optional bell when a new event lands.
The flavour text under the header varies in length, so the plugin captures whatever lines appear and closes the event on the "Realm:" line, which always ends the notice.
Commands weventwin show / hide the window wevent show status and the last event wevent on | off alert note on/off (window still tracks events) wevent sound on | off bell on/off wevent filter all alert on every event (default) wevent filter hard,extreme only alert on these difficulties (comma list) wevent last reprint the last event wevent clear clear the recent list wevent test fire a sample event

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
local enabled = (GetVariable("we_on") ~= "0") local sound = (GetVariable("we_sound") ~= "0") local filter = GetVariable("we_filter") or "all" -- "all" or a comma list of difficulties local visible = (GetVariable("we_visible") == "1") -- window hidden until you ask for it
-- difficulty -> note colour (#RRGGBB) and window colour (BGR) local DIFFCOL = { trivial = "#80D080", easy = "#60E060", normal = "#60C0FF", medium = "#FFD040", hard = "#FF8040", extreme = "#FF4040", legendary = "#E080E0", mythic = "#E080E0", } local DIFFWIN = { trivial = 0x80D080, easy = 0x60E060, normal = 0xFFC060, medium = 0x40D0FF, hard = 0x4080FF, extreme = 0x4040FF, legendary = 0xE080E0, mythic = 0xE080E0, }
local cap = nil -- capture in progress: { body = {}, diff = "", realm = "" } local last = nil -- last completed event local recent = {} -- recent events, newest first
-- ---------------- window ---------------- local WIN = "wevent_" .. GetPluginID() local WW = 470 local C = { bg = 0x101418, border = 0x604020, bar = 0x402818, title = 0x40C0FF, text = 0xE0E0E0, dim = 0x808890, label = 0xC0C0C0 } local win_info
local function trim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")) end
-- wrap a long flavour line to n characters on word boundaries local function wrap(s, n) local out, cur = {}, "" for word in tostring(s or ""):gmatch("%S+") do if cur == "" then cur = word elseif #cur + 1 + #word <= n then cur = cur .. " " .. word else out[#out + 1] = cur; cur = word end end if cur ~= "" then out[#out + 1] = cur end return out end
function we_draw() if not visible then return end if not win_info then win_info = movewindow.install(WIN, 7, 0) end
-- pass 1: make the window exist at a provisional size so the fonts are loaded and we can -- measure them. The old code assumed 74 characters fit, which overflowed the right border. WindowCreate(WIN, win_info.window_left, win_info.window_top, WW, 40, win_info.window_mode, win_info.window_flags, C.bg) WindowFont(WIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(WIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false)
-- Lucida Console is monospaced, so one character measures them all local cw = WindowTextWidth(WIN, "f", "M") if cw < 1 then cw = 7 end local wrapn = math.max(20, math.floor((WW - 20) / cw))
-- lay the current event out so we can size the window to it local lines = {} if last then for _, b in ipairs(last.body) do for _, w in ipairs(wrap(b, wrapn)) do lines[#lines + 1] = w end end end local nrec = math.min(#recent, 6) local H = 22 + math.max(1, #lines) * 13 + 4 + 15 + 13 if nrec > 0 then H = H + 8 + 13 + nrec * 12 end H = H + 8
-- pass 2: real size (WindowCreate clears the canvas, so all drawing happens after this) WindowCreate(WIN, win_info.window_left, win_info.window_top, WW, H, win_info.window_mode, win_info.window_flags, C.bg) WindowFont(WIN, "f", "Lucida Console", 9, false, false, false, false) WindowFont(WIN, "fb", "Lucida Console", 9, true, false, false, false) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, 0, 0, WW, H, C.border) WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, 1, 1, WW - 1, 17, C.bar) WindowText(WIN, "fb", "World Event", 8, 3, 0, 0, C.title) -- hide button WindowRectOp(WIN, 2, WW - 18, 2, WW - 3, 15, C.bar) WindowRectOp(WIN, 1, WW - 18, 2, WW - 3, 15, 0x707070) WindowText(WIN, "fb", "x", WW - 14, 3, 0, 0, 0xE0C8A0) WindowAddHotspot(WIN, "we_hide", WW - 18, 2, WW - 3, 15, "", "", "we_click", "", "", "Hide (weventwin)", 1, 0) movewindow.add_drag_handler(WIN, 0, 0, WW - 20, 17, miniwin.cursor_hand)
local y = 22 if not last then WindowText(WIN, "f", "No world event seen yet.", 10, y, 0, 0, C.dim) y = y + 13 else local dcol = DIFFWIN[trim(last.diff):lower()] or C.text for _, l in ipairs(lines) do WindowText(WIN, "f", l, 10, y, 0, 0, C.text); y = y + 13 end y = y + 4 WindowText(WIN, "fb", "Difficulty:", 10, y, 0, 0, C.label) WindowText(WIN, "fb", last.diff ~= "" and last.diff or "?", 92, y, 0, 0, dcol) WindowText(WIN, "fb", "Realm:", 210, y, 0, 0, C.label) WindowText(WIN, "fb", last.realm ~= "" and last.realm or "?", 262, y, 0, 0, 0x40E0E0) y = y + 15 WindowText(WIN, "f", "seen " .. (last.at or "?"), 10, y, 0, 0, C.dim) y = y + 13 end
if nrec > 0 then y = y + 8 WindowText(WIN, "fb", "-- recent --", 10, y, 0, 0, C.dim); y = y + 13 for i = 1, nrec do local e = recent[i] local dcol = DIFFWIN[trim(e.diff):lower()] or C.text WindowText(WIN, "f", e.at or "?", 10, y, 0, 0, C.dim) WindowText(WIN, "f", (e.diff ~= "" and e.diff or "?"), 62, y, 0, 0, dcol) WindowText(WIN, "f", (e.realm ~= "" and e.realm or "?"), 140, y, 0, 0, 0x40E0E0) y = y + 12 end end
WindowShow(WIN, true) end
function we_click(flags, id) if id == "we_hide" then visible = false; SetVariable("we_visible", "0"); WindowShow(WIN, false) end end
function we_toggle_window() visible = not visible SetVariable("we_visible", visible and "1" or "0") if visible then we_draw() else WindowShow(WIN, false) end end
-- ---------------- alert ---------------- -- play the Windows "ding" only if the file exists (a missing path pops an error box) local function ding() local p = "C:\\Windows\\Media\\ding.wav" local f = io.open(p, "rb") if f then f:close(); Sound(p) end end
local function passes(diff) if filter == "" or filter:lower() == "all" then return true end local d = trim(diff):lower() for w in filter:lower():gmatch("[^,]+") do if trim(w) == d then return true end end return false end
local function note_event(ev, quiet) local col = DIFFCOL[trim(ev.diff):lower()] or "orange" ColourNote(col, "", string.format(" \187 [World Event %s] %s", ev.at or os.date("%H:%M"), ev.body[1] or "(no description)")) for i = 2, #ev.body do ColourNote("silver", "", " " .. ev.body[i]) end ColourNote(col, "", string.format(" Difficulty: %s Realm: %s", ev.diff ~= "" and ev.diff or "?", ev.realm ~= "" and ev.realm or "?")) if sound and not quiet then ding() end end
-- ---------------- capture ---------------- function we_start() cap = { body = {}, diff = "", realm = "" } EnableTriggerGroup("wevent", true) DoAfterSpecial(15, "we_timeout()", 12) -- safety: never leave the catch-all enabled end
-- called for every line while a capture is running function we_line(name, line, wc) if not cap then return end local s = trim((wc and wc[1]) or line) if s == "" then return end if s:find("WORLD EVENT NOTICE", 1, true) then return end -- the header itself local d = s:match("^Difficulty:%s*(.+)$") if d then cap.diff = trim(d); return end local r = s:match("^Realm:%s*(.+)$") if r then cap.realm = trim(r); we_finish(); return end if #cap.body < 5 then cap.body[#cap.body + 1] = s end -- flavour lines end
function we_finish() EnableTriggerGroup("wevent", false) local ev = cap; cap = nil if not ev then return end ev.at = os.date("%H:%M") last = ev table.insert(recent, 1, ev) while #recent > 10 do table.remove(recent) end we_draw() if enabled and passes(ev.diff) then note_event(ev, false) end end
function we_timeout() -- Realm line never arrived (unexpected format): drop the capture, keep triggers clean if cap then cap = nil end EnableTriggerGroup("wevent", false) end
-- ---------------- commands ---------------- function we_set(key, on) SetVariable(key, on and "1" or "0") if key == "we_on" then enabled = on else sound = on end we_status() end
function we_set_filter(s) s = trim(s) filter = (s == "" and "all" or s) SetVariable("we_filter", filter) we_status() end
function we_show_last() if not last then ColourNote("orange", "", "[World Event] nothing seen yet.") return end note_event(last, true) end
function we_clear() recent = {} ColourNote("orange", "", "[World Event] recent list cleared.") we_draw() end
function we_test() we_start() we_line(nil, "A shimmering elven gateway reveals forgotten ruins of the ancient fey!") we_line(nil, "Arcane wards pulse with renewed power as nature reclaims civilization.") we_line(nil, "The echoes of elven magic still resonate through crystalline halls.") we_line(nil, "Difficulty: Hard") we_line(nil, "Realm: Fantasy") end
function we_status() ColourNote("orange", "", string.format( "[World Event] note %s bell %s filter: %s window %s (weventwin, wevent on|off, sound, filter, last, clear, test)", enabled and "ON" or "OFF", sound and "ON" or "OFF", filter, visible and "shown" or "hidden")) if last then ColourNote("silver", "", " last: " .. (last.body[1] or "?") .. " [" .. (last.diff ~= "" and last.diff or "?") .. " / " .. (last.realm ~= "" and last.realm or "?") .. "]") end end
function OnPluginSaveState() if win_info then movewindow.save_state(WIN) end end
function OnPluginInstall() if visible then we_draw() end ColourNote("orange", "", "[World Event] loaded - note " .. (enabled and "ON" or "OFF") .. ", bell " .. (sound and "ON" or "OFF") .. ", filter " .. filter .. ". 'weventwin' for the window, 'wevent' for options.") end
